steps.name: skill-spec-schema
steps.title: Dual-runtime skill spec + validators
steps.summary: Created docs/{cc,codex}-skill.schema.json + src/skill_schema/{__init__,loader,validator,prompts}.py + 5 fixtures + tests/test_skill_schema.py (10 tests pass). AC1-AC5 all exit 0.

steps.name: skill-sub-mode
steps.title: skill-creator: 3-question interview + dual SKILL.md emitter
steps.summary: Added mode=skill_create via registry (no forking). src/skill_schema/prompts.py (3Q) + src/engine/modes/skill_create.py + SkillInterviewState + src/emitter/skill.py emit_skill() + cli.py dispatch. tests/test_skill_sub_mode.py (11 tests) + tests/test_skill_prompts.py (7 tests) all pass.

steps.name: plugin-sub-mode
steps.title: plugin-creator: 5-question interview + plugin.json + dual-skill bundle emitter
steps.summary: Added --skill-slug to existing CLI; src/emitter/plugin_skill_bundle.py wraps 0-mvp's codex.emit and additionally emits dual-runtime skill bundle (CC + Codex). Reuses 0-mvp's 5-question schema and emitter unchanged. tests/test_plugin_sub_mode.py (8 tests) all pass.

steps.name: adapter-register
steps.title: CC + Codex adapters register skill-creator and plugin-creator as native skills
steps.summary: Added SKILL.md templates under src/adapter/{cc,codex}_skills/{skill,plugin}-creator/ + register_cc_skill() and register_codex_skill() siblings. 0-mvp register_cc/register_codex signatures unchanged (backward-compat verified). tests/test_skill_adapter.py (15 tests) all pass.

steps.name: e2e-parity
steps.title: E2E + dual-runtime parity test
steps.summary: tests/e2e/test_dual_runtime_parity.py (7 tests, kill-condition checks) + tests/e2e/test_skill_creator_e2e.py (4 tests). The kill condition (CC SKILL.md body == Codex SKILL.md body byte-equal, only frontmatter shape differs) is verified. scripts/ci-local.sh → exit 0 (246 tests + 1 xfailed pass).
